name: Joe
text: Rob took time to explain the leak damage properly, guided us through every step and produced a thorough report that made the next move much clearer.

name: Denise T
text: Our older property had been troubled by damp for years. Rob responded quickly, visited within days and delivered a detailed report the next day.

name: Saf N
text: The survey was outstanding from start to finish. Rob explained the process clearly, used thermal imaging and set out the root cause with practical next steps.

name: Amy P
text: The survey on our house was incredibly thorough and professional. The report showed real expertise, and Rob even took time to explain the thermal images to my son.

name: Antonio A
text: The pre-purchase damp survey was invaluable. Rob arranged the visit quickly, kept me updated and delivered a solution-focused report that made the decision easier.

name: Jesse D
text: We were really pleased with the service. The report was incredibly detailed and comprehensive, and it gave us exactly the clarity we needed.

name: Yousuf M
text: Communication through Checkatrade was quick, the survey was booked in fast and the detailed report arrived the same evening.

name: Jason
text: Rob arrived exactly when promised and gave a thorough assessment of what we needed to consider. Very knowledgeable and would definitely use again.

name: Steve S
text: The communication was excellent and the survey explained complex heritage-property issues in a way that was easy to understand, with a clear focus on solutions.
